name: naga-group
_comment: Build-only scripts with no runtime dependencies

scripts.build: (cd files/plugins && bun build planning-enforcement.ts --outfile planning-enforcement.js --target node --bundle) && bunx ocx build . --out dist
scripts.test:full: bun run test/setup.ts && bun run test/runner.ts
scripts.test:e2e:full: bun run test/setup.ts && bun run test/e2e-runner.ts
